title: Alan Comnes
compiled_truth: Alan Comnes is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-11-01 to 2002-02-06), Alan Comnes sent 332 and received 2479 emails, totalling 2811 interactions. Top correspondents: [Jeff Dasovich](people/jeff-dasovich) (227), [Susan Mara](people/susan-mara) (183), [Tim Belden](people/tim-belden) (165), [Ray Alvarez](people/ray-alvarez) (133), [Paul Kaufman](people/paul-kaufman) (114). Mailbox folders observed: _americas, bill_williams_iii, calendar, california_coverup, california_issues, chris_stokley.
